header.taglineWithNetwork.description: Search box tagline when scoped to one parent domain (subdomain search). {parentDomain} is the parent domain name, e.g. 'example.com' — keep untranslated.

header.taglineAllNetworks.description: Search box tagline when searching across all networks/TLDs.

header.networkLabel.description: Inline label preceding the selected network/chain name. Ends with a colon.

header.allNetworks.description: Option meaning every network; shown in the network selector.

modeTabs.register.description: Tab label: switch search into 'register a new domain' mode.

modeTabs.import.description: Tab label: switch search into 'import an existing domain' mode.

input.placeholder.description: Placeholder text inside the domain search input.

input.importPlaceholder.description: Multi-line placeholder explaining the two accepted paste formats for importing domains. Keep the literal example lines (example.com, authcode123, domain1.com…) and the newlines intact; translate only the instructional prose.

input.searchButton.description: Button that runs the domain search.

input.importButton.description: Button that submits domains for import.

input.clearParentDomainAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the button that clears the selected parent domain.

input.freeMintTooltipWithParent.description: Tooltip promoting free subdomain claims under a specific parent domain. {parentDomain} is the parent domain name — keep untranslated.

input.freeMintTooltipAllDomains.description: Tooltip promoting free domain claims when no parent is selected.

card.priceWithCurrency.description: Price shown on a domain result card. {price} is a pre-formatted numeric amount (e.g. '18'); keep the 'USD' currency code.

card.renewsAt.description: Secondary price line on a result card showing the yearly renewal price. {price} is a formatted price including currency.

card.owner.description: Label on a result card showing who owns a taken domain. {owner} is a truncated wallet address or name — keep untranslated.

card.notRegistered.description: Status badge: the domain is not registered (available to register).

card.unsupported.description: Status badge: this TLD/domain is not supported by Namefi.

card.lockedShort.description: Status badge: the domain is locked (transfer/registrar lock). Short form.

card.temporarilyUnimportable.description: Status badge: the domain cannot be imported right now (temporary).

card.taken.description: Status badge: the domain is already registered/owned by someone.

card.unavailableShort.description: Status badge: the domain is unavailable. Short form.

card.temporarilyUnavailable.description: Status badge: the domain is temporarily unavailable.

card.freeClaim.description: Badge/button indicating the domain can be claimed for free.

card.addToWishlist.description: Accessibility/tooltip label for the button that adds the domain to the wishlist.

card.removeFromWishlist.description: Accessibility/tooltip label for the button that removes the domain from the wishlist.

card.eppCode.description: Field label for the EPP / domain transfer auth code. 'EPP' is a technical term — keep it.

card.savedEppCode.description: Label indicating a previously saved EPP auth code is on file.

card.marketplace.description: Generic fallback name for an external marketplace source (lowercase, used inline).

card.buyShort.description: Short buy button on a result card.

card.buyOn.description: Buy button prefix, followed by a marketplace name/logo, e.g. 'Buy on [OpenSea]'.

card.buyOnSourceAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the buy button. {source} is a marketplace name, e.g. 'OpenSea' — keep untranslated.

card.buyOnSourceFromSellerAriaLabel.description: Accessibility label (screen-reader only) for the buy button when a seller is known. {source} = marketplace name, {seller} = seller name/address — keep both untranslated.

results.errorTitle.description: Title shown when the domain search fails.

results.errorDescription.description: Body text shown when the domain search fails, inviting a retry.

results.loadMore.description: Button to load more search results.

results.noResultsTitle.description: Title shown when a search returns no domains.

results.noResultsDescription.description: Body text shown when a search returns no domains, suggesting a different term. {query} is the user's search term, echoed back inside quotes.
